ddls:
CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "cpp_side" TEXT /* C++ representation of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the function does */,
  "argument" TEXT /* Description of the function's arguments */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Description of the return type */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the function (e.g., simple, medium, complex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the function (e.g., data manipulation, data retrieval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Integer, Float) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "size" TEXT /* Typical size of the data type (e.g., 4 bytes for an integer) */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of values for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the library does */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the library */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies required by the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, researcher) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to (e.g., development, research) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function called */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the function */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the function was called */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the function in milliseconds */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the function call was successful */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used in the function call */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Output data generated by the function call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function that generated the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurred */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., syntax error, runtime error) */,
  "stack_trace" TEXT /* Stack trace of the error for debugging purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function for which metrics are being collected */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average execution time of the function */,
  "call_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the function has been called */,
  "average_memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage during function execution */,
  "average_cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage during function execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function related to the documentation */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the documentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of what the documentation covers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the documentation */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function that requires the dependency */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency library or module */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dependency */,
  "installation_command" TEXT /* Command needed to install the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)
